notes: The response is thorough and technically credible but critically fails on MVP bounding (no bounded subset with explicit deferrals — it covers all workstreams), misses the RBNZ BS11 30-business-day notification obligation as a named hard constraint, produces out-of-scope items without firm reasons, uses generic stakeholder roles rather than named personas with cost/timing context, and success criteria lack baseline anchoring — the dominant failure is that the output reads as a full program plan rather than a bounded MVP discovery artefact.
